title: GTA Online
headline: GTA Online
subtitle: Get the New Shitzu Keitora
content:
Unlike the vapid influencers on your Bleeter and LifeInvader feeds, the Shitzu Keitora earned its cult following. This Utility import packs serious power into its diminutive frame, punching above its weight class while moonlighting as a drifting powerhouse.

Join the following — get the new Keitora from Southern San Andreas Super Autos. Test it out free of charge on the Test Track inside the LS Car Meet.
